name: Hellish Honey
descrip: A black-and-green metal can containing a potent brew that increases all Arousal dealt by 15%, but applies the Overheat effect inflicted by hellhounds for 15 turns. The packaging shows a picture of a smiling, buxom hellhound and alraune duo with their ample busts tightly pressed together.
useOutcome: |f|GivePerkQuietly|/|Overheat|n||f|ChangePerkDuration|/|Overheat|/|15|n|[AttackerName] downs the surprisingly steaming hot beverage and is instantly filled with a strange mixture of lustful readiness and hot, pulsing need that washes over their entire body, making them obsessively eager for sex!
